roadmap_packs_1_to_12.title: Modular Environment Kit
roadmap_packs_1_to_12.production_focus: convert environment modules into grid-snapped prefabs with collision, snapping sockets, material variants, and navigation rules

roadmap_packs_1_to_12.title: Biome-Specific Prop Packs
roadmap_packs_1_to_12.production_focus: tag by biome, make instanced prop prefabs, assign simple colliders, and create density/placement rules

roadmap_packs_1_to_12.title: Shop and Town Interior Assets
roadmap_packs_1_to_12.production_focus: convert shop/interior meshes into interactive shop, inn, blacksmith, dye, and display prefabs

roadmap_packs_1_to_12.title: Item Pickup and Equipment Display
roadmap_packs_1_to_12.production_focus: map item database entries to archetype prefabs, rarity glows, loot beams, pickup triggers, and display stands

roadmap_packs_1_to_12.title: VFX Proxy Assets
roadmap_packs_1_to_12.production_focus: turn static VFX meshes into timed VFX prefabs with emissive/additive materials, scaling curves, despawn, and hitbox sync

roadmap_packs_1_to_12.title: Animation Placeholder Pack
roadmap_packs_1_to_12.production_focus: use pose proxies as animation reference targets; create humanoid/quadruped placeholder state machines

roadmap_packs_1_to_12.title: UI/HUD 3D/2D Worldspace Markers
roadmap_packs_1_to_12.production_focus: convert markers to worldspace UI prefabs with billboard behavior, distance fading, occlusion rules, and accessibility scaling

roadmap_packs_1_to_12.title: Quest Interaction Objects
roadmap_packs_1_to_12.production_focus: add interactable components, quest state visibility, objective highlighting, and completion logic

roadmap_packs_1_to_12.title: Mounts, Vehicles, and Travel
roadmap_packs_1_to_12.production_focus: add ride/board/use components, nav constraints, docking points, camera anchors, and travel transitions

roadmap_packs_1_to_12.title: Enemy Faction Architecture
roadmap_packs_1_to_12.production_focus: make faction structures, hazards, spawn anchors, turrets, nest objects, and destructible objectives into prefabs

roadmap_packs_1_to_12.title: Boss Arena Set Pack
roadmap_packs_1_to_12.production_focus: build boss arena prefabs with mechanic anchors, climbing points, phase triggers, lane markers, hazard zones, and camera volumes

roadmap_packs_1_to_12.title: Audio Placeholder Pack
roadmap_packs_1_to_12.production_focus: import WAV cues as audio events, group by mixer, add spatialization, variation, cooldown, and replacement hooks
